testcase.name: test_register_and_email_unique

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ('token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0MTkzOWUxZi03YWU4LTQzMWYtODkyNi0xOGUwNTM3NjQ0MmIiLCJlbWFpbCI6InRlc3RfYTQ5ODM2MWJAY3VybG5lY3QuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6ImNsaWVudCIsImV4cCI6MTc4MjA3MTE1MywidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.SqAzGV6A13B-ZnYpPuFgSRairZyOnZiG4QQPuDnK59A', 'user': {'email': 'test_a498361b@curlnect.com', 'id': '41939e1f-7ae8-431f-8926-18e05376442b', 'name': 'Test User', 'role': 'client'}} and 'test_a498361b@curlnect.com' == 'TEST_a498361b@curlnect.com'
- TEST_a498361b@curlnect.com ? ^^^^ + test_a498361b@curlnect.com ? ^^^^)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_curlnect_backend.py:107: in test_register_and_email_unique assert "token" in data and data["user"]["email"] == email E AssertionError: assert ('token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0MTkzOWUxZi03YWU4LTQzMWYtODkyNi0xOGUwNTM3NjQ0MmIiLCJlbWFpbCI6InRlc3RfYTQ5ODM2MWJAY3VybG5lY3QuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6ImNsaWVudCIsImV4cCI6MTc4MjA3MTE1MywidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.SqAzGV6A13B-ZnYpPuFgSRairZyOnZiG4QQPuDnK59A', 'user': {'email': 'test_a498361b@curlnect.com', 'id': '41939e1f-7ae8-431f-8926-18e05376442b', 'name': 'Test User', 'role': 'client'}} and 'test_a498361b@curlnect.com' == 'TEST_a498361b@curlnect.com' E E - TEST_a498361b@curlnect.com E ? ^^^^ E + test_a498361b@curlnect.com E ? ^^^^)
